title: [Aso] Syllabus in App – Syllabus menu – Student opens menu and sees syllabus list
description: Integration: Student opens the Syllabus menu in the Learner App and the syllabus list page loads with published syllabuses.
preconditions:
Feature flag lesson.syllabus_master.is_enabled = true
Student is enrolled with Grade = 2年 in Academic Year = 2026
At least one Published Syllabus Master exists linked to the student's Curriculum Subject
steps_actions:
1. "Login to Learner App as student"
2. "Tap Syllabus menu"
3. "Observe the syllabus list page"
steps_result:
1. "App home screen displayed"
2. "Syllabus list page opens"
3. "Published syllabuses displayed as cards; Draft syllabuses not shown"
steps_data:
1. "Role: Student\nGrade: 2年\nAcademic Year: 2026"
2. ""
3. "Expected: only Published syllabus cards visible"
